context: Tests whether the agent follows rails-engine-author conventions: using isolate_namespace, providing a configure block with a Configuration class, defining the host-app contract, providing copy generators for migrations (not silent apply), referencing host models via configurable class names, and using a minimal lib/engine.rb structure.

checklist.name: isolate_namespace used
checklist.description: lib/audit_trail/engine.rb calls isolate_namespace AuditTrail inside the Engine class

checklist.name: configure block pattern
checklist.description: lib/audit_trail.rb defines a self.configure method that yields a Configuration instance (the standard configure do |config| pattern)

checklist.name: Configuration class
checklist.description: lib/audit_trail/configuration.rb defines an AuditTrail::Configuration class with at least one attr_accessor for the host user class or equivalent

checklist.name: Configurable user class
checklist.description: The Configuration class has an attribute for the host app's user class name (e.g. user_class or actor_class) defaulting to a string (e.g. 'User'), NOT a hard-coded constant

checklist.name: No hard-coded host constant
checklist.description: The engine code does NOT reference ::User, ::Employee, or any other host app constant directly — uses the configurable class name or constantize pattern instead

checklist.name: Migrations not auto-applied
checklist.description: lib/audit_trail/engine.rb does NOT call initializer or config block that runs migrations automatically — no db:migrate call in engine code

checklist.name: Host contract documented
checklist.description: host_contract.md exists and describes at minimum: (1) what the host must configure, and (2) what the engine exposes

checklist.name: lib/audit_trail.rb minimal
checklist.description: lib/audit_trail.rb requires version, configuration, and engine — does not contain business logic

checklist.name: Dummy app routes mount engine
checklist.description: spec/dummy/config/routes.rb mounts AuditTrail::Engine at some path

checklist.name: Model namespaced
checklist.description: app/models/audit_trail/audit_event.rb defines AuditTrail::AuditEvent (namespace matches engine isolation)

checklist.name: Engine type justified
checklist.description: host_contract.md or engine.rb comments state the engine type chosen (mountable/full/plain) — OR the engine class correctly inherits from ::Rails::Engine
